instruction: In Apple Notes, export your notes to HTML using the default export path.

parameters.note_body: Capture priorities, budget assumptions, and owners for the Q2 plan.

reference_command:
default_export="$HOME/Desktop/notes"
target="$HOME/Desktop/notes_export_1"
if [ -d "$target" ]; then
  rm -rf "$target"
fi
printf 'y\n\n' | memo notes --export
if [ -d "$default_export" ]; then
  mv "$default_export" "$target"
fi
